H1.name: Embedding strength > 0.70
H1.details: All sectors exceed 0.70 at depths 1-12; projection and antisymmetry remain above 0.70 through depth 20; neutral falls to 0.6978 at depth 20

H2.name: Embedding deformation < 0.30
H2.details: All sectors remain below 0.30 threshold across all depths; maximum deformation 0.2001 at neutral depth 20

H3.name: Cross-depth alignment > 0.75
H3.details: All sectors maintain > 0.75 alignment through depth 16; neutral falls to 0.7578 at depth 20

H4.name: RG stability > 0.90
H4.details: RG similarity peaks at 0.9712 (projection, depth 1); never exceeds 0.90 beyond depth 3; falls to 0.8456 at neutral depth 20

H5.name: Embedding retention nonzero through maximum depth
H5.details: All sectors maintain nonzero embedding retention across all depths
